steps.action: Read README.md and verify required section set and executable setup/test instructions.
steps.expected: README contains overview, stack, prerequisites, local setup, tests, docker deploy, module overview, API docs, architecture, contributing.
steps.observed: README.md includes all 10 required sections with concrete commands (compile, gate-fast, docker compose, health check) and required env variables (JWT_SECRET, ERP_SECURITY_ENCRYPTION_KEY).

steps.action: Validate baseline command compatibility by running gate-fast suite.
steps.expected: Project baseline command referenced in docs should succeed.
steps.observed: `cd erp-domain && mvn test -Pgate-fast -Djacoco.skip=true` completed with BUILD SUCCESS and `Tests run: 394, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0`.

evidence.output: Automated content checks all true for README required sections; gate-fast succeeded.

steps.action: Read docs/architecture.md and validate required architecture coverage and real code references.
steps.expected: Doc covers module dependencies, decomposition rationale, event/accounting flows, schema/migration strategy with concrete code references.
steps.observed: Architecture document includes runtime topology, module inventory, cross-module O2C/P2P/M2S/payroll/tenant/migration/period/support flows, and explicit `erp-domain/src/main/java/...` file references plus Flyway dual-track strategy.

evidence.output: architecture_checks flags are all true: module inventory, dependency graph, code refs, flyway strategy, 14-module coverage.

steps.action: Read docs/developer-guide.md and verify day-1 onboarding sections.
steps.expected: Guide includes workflow, local setup, testing, module development conventions, deployment notes, debugging tips.
steps.observed: Developer guide includes all required sections with executable commands and conventions for DTOs, error handling, idempotency, audit, CI overview, and troubleshooting.

evidence.output: developer_guide_checks flags are all true for all six required sections.

frictions.description: Task subagent spawn failed with model alias error (`Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.3-codex-xhigh-pro`).
frictions.resolution: Executed flow validation directly in-session and produced flow report artifact manually.

summary: Validated docs-core assertion group through direct file inspection plus executable gate-fast evidence; all three assertions passed.
